title: Polarion REST API Schemas
description: JSON Schema definitions for the Polarion ALM REST API (239 schemas)

copyWorkflowStatusAndSignatures.description: Specifies that workflow status and signatures should be copied to the branched document.

targetProjectId.description: Project where new document will be created.

targetSpaceId.description: Space where new document will be created.

copyWorkflowStatusAndSignatures.description: Specifies that workflow status and signatures should be copied to the branched document.

initializedFields.description: Specifies fields of overwritten Work Items that should be initialized (instead of being copied from source Work Items).

overwriteWorkItems.description: Specifies that Work Items in the branched Document should be overwritten (instead of being referenced).

sourceDocument.description: Reference path of the source Document.

targetProjectId.description: Project where new document will be created.

targetSpaceId.description: Space where new document will be created.

updateTitleHeading.description: Specifies that title heading of the target Document should be set to the new Document's title.

linkOriginalItemsWithRole.description: Link a copy of the document to the original.

targetProjectId.description: Project where new document will be created.

location.description: Location of the new Project to be created.

templateId.description: Id of the template to create the new Project from.

trackerPrefix.description: Tracker prefix of the new Project to be created.
